headline: VP of Developer Experience at the Agentic AI Foundation

bioMarkdown: Developer-experience executive focused on helping teams design, implement, and adopt agentic AI systems. International keynote speaker and educator with a strong bridge between engineering practice, open-source ecosystems, and AI adoption.

headline: Co-founder and CEO of Aviator
title: Founder & CEO
confidenceNote: Aviator, LinkedIn, Sessionize, and author profiles consistently identify Ankit Jain as co-founder/CEO of Aviator and connect him to developer productivity and DevEx.
bioMarkdown: Co-founder and CEO of Aviator, building developer-productivity tooling for engineering teams shipping AI-generated and human-authored code at scale. Strong match for conversations about DevEx, code review, merge automation, CI/CD, and engineering productivity metrics.
